creator: r.c.ladan@gmail.com
text:
The file app_info.xml.in as supplied is wrong, the corrections are:
* change ${SETI_BINARY} to %%SETI_BINARY%%
* change ${STRIPPED_PORTVERSION} to %%STRIPPED_PORTVERSION%%

I found this while installing the new version.

Rene
